creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
Hi,

I've merged your port with what I've had.  The changes I made over
yours can be summarized as follows:

	- Update to Liece 1.4.4 which has been available over half a
	year. (The website hasn't been updated though)

	- Add support for multiple emacs flavors and make
	liece-emacs20 as a slave port.

	- Optionally install the documents. (cf. NOPORTDOCS)

	- Do install-info upon installation and uninstallation.

	- Define USE_GMAKE because its Makefile uses some gmake
	specific macros.

Would you test it?  Just in case you cannot extract what I attached, I
put the tarball on my web space:

	http://www.iDaemons.org/~knu/liece.tar.gz

Regards,

-- 
                     /
                    /__  __            Akinori.org / MUSHA.org
                   / )  )  ) )  /     FreeBSD.org / Ruby-lang.org
Akinori MUSHA aka / (_ /  ( (__(  @ iDaemons.org / and.or.jp

"We're only at home when we're on the run, on the wing, on the fly"
